parsed_review.summary: CP00-658 (RP21 Admin Console failure receipt/escalation descriptor slice, risk A, 10 units, RP21.P07.M03.S15-RP21.P07.M04.S02) passes hardened read-only review. The pack-level production_ready posture is correctly gated, not overclaimed: manifest, adjudication, construction-inspection, and command-evidence all report production_ready=false/runtime_ready=false pending this Claude review, while local evidence supports the descriptor-only completion claim. Implementation across packages/admin/src/{registry,service,validators}.js exposes all six required exports (ADMIN_CONSOLE_CP658_PACK_BINDING, ADMIN_CONSOLE_CP658_REQUIREMENTS, createAdminConsoleCp658FailureReceiptEscalationDescriptor/CaseSet, validateAdminConsoleCp658FailureReceiptEscalationDescriptor/Coverage) and forces descriptor-only/no-write/no-real-data flags via freezeCp658Result and freezeCp658Validation. Deliverable distribution (hermes_evidence:2, fixture:1, test:2, security_audit:1, claude_review:1, implementation:1, failure_recovery:2) and micro-title split (8 Primary, 2 Secondary) match the baseline and are enforced by validateAdminConsoleCp658Coverage. The descriptor validator's falseFlags list rejects any runtime/write/audit/leak flag flip; Hermes and Claude packets stay descriptor-only (runtime_receipt_emitted=false, hermes_runtime_opened=false, read_only=true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false), confirming Hermes control-plane patterns are used only for deterministic packet/receipt handling and not product runtime. model.test.js covers coverage, descriptor-only rows, evidence packets, handoff, and historical projection; the validator script deep-equals contract sections against generated descriptors; contract runtime_opened=false. Review-hardening preconditions are met: auth preflight passed with 1434-byte non-empty stdout, review-schema present, tools restricted to Read/Grep/Glob, prompt 2499<25600 bytes, no forbidden tools, and no malformed/fenced/0-byte/tool-call-shaped review evidence. All ten expected validation commands plus npm test are recorded at exit 0. Claude's read-only, non-final-approval role and the human/enterprise-trust approval boundary are preserved; the pack claims neither runtime nor enterprise trust, so this CP closeout goal is not blocked. Queue state is consistent (live_latest CP00-658, next CP00-659 at RP21.P07.M04.S03). Unrelated dirty/untracked files were correctly excluded from pack scope per changed-file-scope.json. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
